displayMetadata.value:

FREE limited edition DARLIE x Quby Glass Jar (on pack) with every purchase of DARLIE x Quby Promo Pack-of-3s

• 2X Freshness in 1 Tube - get combined double benefits of Mouthwash & Toothpaste for a deeper cleanse.
• Formulated with a patented LiquiDual Technology^ which combines the functionality of Mouthwash & Toothpaste.
• 2 steps, 1 fresher smile - First: Brush thoroughly; Second; Gargle with water for 5 seconds!
• Achieve deeper cleanse between gaps - remove plaque & bacteria from hard to reach places.
• Stronger 3X plaque removal power3.
• Offers stronger 12-hour bacterial defense2 - anti-bad breath protection.
• Comes with DARLIE's signature 100% Natural Mint Essence formula4 for long lasting freshness
• Fortified with Zinc Citrate to help kill 99.9% of bacteria5

displayMetadata.value:
• Directions:
1. Do not swallow
2. Rinse and spit out after use

product.description:
• Formulated with a patented LiquiDual Technology^ which combines the functionality of Mouthwash & Toothpaste.
• 2 steps, 1 fresher smile - First: Brush thoroughly; Second; Gargle with water for 5 seconds!
• Achieve deeper cleanse between gaps - remove plaque & bacteria from hard to reach places.
• Stronger 3X plaque removal power3.
• Offers stronger 12-hour bacterial defense2 - anti-bad breath protection.
• Comes with DARLIE's signature 100% Natural Mint Essence formula4 for long lasting freshness
• Fortified with Zinc Citrate to help kill 99.9% of bacteria5

Enjoy freshness like never before!

^Advanced formula with dual benefits: Anti-bad breath & Anti-bacterial.
2Clinically proven, compared with Darlie regular fluoride toothpaste.
33X reduction of plaque index compared with a regular Darlie toothpaste without Zinc Citrate after 3 months of usage
4Peppermint & Spearmint oils in flavour are 100% original from natural plants.
5In vitro study, effectively reduce 99.9% bacteria (Streptococcus mutans). Based on the anti-bacterial efficacy test result of DARLIE Double Action series toothpastes showed more than 99.9% reduction of oral bacteria.

metaData.Key Information:
The New Colgate Total Fresh Mint toothpaste, for Active Prevention, helps to fight the root cause of 8 oral health problems - Gum Problems, Plaque, Tartar, Sensitivity, Enamel Erosion, Stains, Bad Breath, Cavities. Its Powerful, Patented, Preventative Technology is clinically proven to provide 24 hours antibacterial action*, that provides long lasting preventative benefits against bacteria to help prevent oral care problems before they start. this formula contains a unique system that stabilizes our active ingredient and is designed for superior*** performance to help prevent many common oral care issues.

Use Colgate Total toothpaste twice daily to actively prevent against oral care problems before they start.

* 2x daily brushing with 4 weeks continued use
*** vs. non-antibacterial fluoride toothpaste
